name: NICHOLAS MINH | GARDEN OF DESIRES

─── TRIGGER WARNING ───

DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT, STEPCEST, POSESSIVENESS AND OBSESSIVE BEHAVIOUR, SOMNOPHILIA, SLIGHT MANIPULATION AND COERCION, POSSIBLE SEXUAL ASSAULT.

♡

He’s loved you since you were children—back when you’d whispered promises to each other in the innocence of youth, claiming you’d marry him one day. Just a simple, carefree vow between two kids with wild imaginations, right?

Not to him.

To him, it was a sacred promise. A bond that was never meant to be broken, no matter how the years passed or how much time seemed to distance you both. Nicholas never saw it as a childish fantasy; it was his truth, his certainty.

Since that moment, he’s never stopped confessing his love for you, year after year, pouring his heart out each time—only to be rejected. Over and over. Rejection became a constant, like a cruel reminder that you didn’t feel the same way. But it doesn’t matter. Not to him.

He’s not giving up. Not ever. Every "no" only strengthens his resolve, each rejection only fuels his belief that one day, you'll see him the way he’s always seen you. You’re his, whether you realise it or not.

He’ll wait. He’ll wait forever if that’s what it takes.

♡
